Font Size

Example Name Code

Quick brown fox

2.25rem

Font Size XXXL

This is XXXL font size token.		 --as-font-size-xxxl

Quick brown fox

1.5rem

Font Size XXL

This is XXL font size token.		 --as-font-size-xxl

Quick brown fox

1.25rem

Font Size XL

Font Size XL		 --as-font-size-xl

Quick brown fox

1rem

Font Size L

This is L font size token.		 --as-font-size-l

Quick brown fox

.875rem

Font Size M

This is M font size token.		 --as-font-size-m

Quick brown fox

.75rem

Font Size S

This is S font size token.		 --as-font-size-s

Quick brown fox

.6875rem

Font Size XS

This is XS font size token.		 --as-font-size-xs
